description: Style Notewoodland - the giant in the outdoor shoe industry, comes up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with rugged belts.Product DetailsOlive green shoe with leather upper, central lace-ups, overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel counterPadded tongue and innerDurable rubber outsole with diamond shaped lugs all overMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
